message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for --graph-root.svg, --graph-format.svg,
.agent-mail.yaml, and .beads/.br_history/ to prevent bv graph
output, agent coordination config, and beads history snapshots
from being tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,3 +58,13 @@ legacy/
 # Temporary directories
 tmp/
 test_logs/
+
+# bv graph output
+--graph-root.svg
+--graph-format.svg
+
+# Agent coordination config
+.agent-mail.yaml
+
+# Beads history snapshots
+.beads/.br_history/
